text: The capital of France is Paris.
The capital of Japan is Tokyo.
The capital of India is New Delhi.
The capital of the United States is Washington, D.C.
The capital of the United Kingdom is London.
The capital of Germany is Berlin.
The capital of Italy is Rome.
The capital of China is Beijing.
The capital of Russia is Moscow.
The capital of Canada is Ottawa.
The capital of Australia is Canberra.
The capital of Brazil is Brasilia.
The capital of Egypt is Cairo.
The capital of Spain is Madrid.
The capital of Pakistan is Islamabad.
The speed of light in vacuum is 299,792,458 metres per second.
The boiling point of water at sea level is 100 degrees Celsius.
The freezing point of water at sea level is 0 degrees Celsius.
The chemical symbol for gold is Au.
The chemical symbol for iron is Fe.
The chemical symbol for oxygen is O.
The chemical symbol for sodium is Na.
The largest planet in the solar system is Jupiter.
The smallest planet in the solar system is Mercury.
The closest planet to the Sun is Mercury.
The red planet is Mars.
Earth has one natural satellite, the Moon.
The author of the play Hamlet is William Shakespeare.
The author of the theory of general relativity is Albert Einstein.
The painter of the Mona Lisa is Leonardo da Vinci.
The first person to walk on the Moon was Neil Armstrong in 1969.
The longest river in the world is the Nile.
The tallest mountain on Earth above sea level is Mount Everest.
The largest ocean on Earth is the Pacific Ocean.
The largest country by land area is Russia.
The most populous country in the world is India.
The smallest country in the world is Vatican City.
Water is a chemical compound made of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom, with the formula H2O.
The number of bones in the adult human body is 206.
The powerhouse of the cell is the mitochondrion.
The process by which plants make food using sunlight is photosynthesis.
The gas that humans exhale and plants absorb is carbon dioxide.
The hardest naturally occurring material is diamond.
The acceleration due to gravity at Earth's surface is about 9.81 metres per second squared.
The square root of 144 is 12.
There are 7 continents on Earth: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, and South America.
The currency of Japan is the yen.
The currency of the United Kingdom is the pound sterling.
The currency of India is the rupee.
The human heart has four chambers: two atria and two ventricles.
DNA stands for deoxyribonucleic acid.
The programming language Python was created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.
The largest mammal on Earth is the blue whale.
The fastest land animal is the cheetah.
